AnswerInput.description: Author-submitted answer rule. Exact plaintext is digested before storage.

ChallengeResponse.description: Player-safe challenge response. Answer rules never appear here.

mfa_code.description: Six-digit TOTP or a single-use recovery code when MFA is enabled.

RecoveryCodesResponse.description: Recovery codes are returned exactly once.

codes.description: Single-use codes. The operator must store these safely.

RecoveryCompleteRequest.description: Complete recovery with a new password.

RecoveryStartRequest.description: Begin recovery without revealing whether an identity exists.

SessionResponse.description: Session bootstrap used by the Svelte client.

csrf_token.description: CSRF value required in `x-csrf-token` on mutations.

current.description: Whether this is the calling session.

required.description: True when no user exists and setup can be completed.

TotpEnrollmentResponse.description: TOTP enrollment data for an authenticator application.

VisibilityInput.description: Visibility window, division targeting, and unlock graph.

info.description: Typed organizer, player, integration, and realtime API
info.title: Kitsune API
